# Load Balancing for DNN Inference in VEC

1. Huang, H., Zhan, W., Min, G., Duan, Z., Peng, K.: Mobility-aware computation offloading with load balancing in smart city networks using MEC federation. IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing 23(11), 10411–10428 (2024)
2. Xu, Y., Mohammed, T., Di Francesco, M., Fischione, C.: Distributed assignment with load balancing for DNN inference at the edge. IEEE Internet of Things Journal 10(2), 1053–1065 (2022)
3. Hou, X., Guan, Y., Han, T.: Dystri: A dynamic inference based distributed DNN service framework on edge. In: International Conference on Parallel Processing. pp. 625–634 (2023)
4. Sun, J., Wang, H., Nie, L., Feng, G., Zhang, Z., Liu, J.: A joint strategy for service deployment and task offloading in satellite–terrestrial IoT. Computer Networks 225, 109656 (2023)
5. Zhao, Y., Liu, C., Hu, X., He, J., Peng, M., Ng, D.W.K., Quek, T.Q.: Joint content caching, service placement and task offloading in UAV-enabled mobile edge computing networks. IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications 43(1), 51–63 (2024)
6. Xiao, F., Fan, W., Han, L., Qiu, T., Cheng, X.: Joint service deployment and task offloading for datacenters with edge heterogeneous servers. IEEE Transactions on Services Computing pp. 1–14 (2025)
7. Liao, Z., Hu, W., Huang, J., Wang, J.: Joint multi-user DNN partitioning and task offloading in mobile edge computing. Ad Hoc Networks 144, 103156 (2023)
8. Li, H., Li, X., Fan, Q., He, Q., Wang, X., Leung, V.C.: Distributed DNN inference with fine-grained model partitioning in mobile edge computing networks. IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing 23(10), 9060–9074 (2024)
9. Dai, P., Han, B., Li, K., Xu, X., Xing, H., Liu, K.: Joint optimization of device placement and model partitioning for cooperative DNN inference in heterogeneous edge computing. IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing 24(1), 210–226 (2025)
10. Wang, X., Gao, G., Wu, X., Lyu, Y., Wu, W.: Dynamic DNN model selection and inference off loading for video analytics with edge-cloud collaboration. In: International Workshop on Network and Operating System Support for Digital Audio and Video. pp. 64–70 (2022)
11. Zhao, K., Zhou, Z., Chen, X., Zhou, R., Zhang, X., Yu, S., Wu, D.: Edgeadaptor: Online configuration adaption, model selection and resource provisioning for edge DNN inference serving at scale. IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing 22(10), 5870–5886 (2023)
12. Xu, J., Yao, H., Zhang, R., Mai, T., Guizani, M.: Low latency and accuracy-guaranteed DNN inference for UAV-assisted IoT networks. IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking pp. 1–1 (2025)
13. Xu, J., Yao, Y., Xu, X., Feng, W., Li, P.: Joint optimization of task offloading and resource allocation of fog network by considering matching externalities and dynamics. IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing 24(4), 2534–2550 (2025)
14. Chi, J., Qiu, T., Xiao, F., Zhou, X.: ATOM: Adaptive task offloading with two-stage hybrid matching in MEC-enabled industrial IoT. IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing 23(5), 4861–4877 (2023)
15. Zhou, R., Huang, Y., Wang, Y., Jiao, L., Tan, H., Zhang, R., Wu, L.: User preference oriented service caching and task offloading for UAV-assisted MEC networks. IEEE Transactions on Services Computing pp. 1–12 (2025)
